definitions.usage_context_en: La cualidad de ser fácil de abordar, entrar o usar.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: The quality of being easy to approach, enter, or use.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: Language can be a barrier.]

definitions.usage_context_en: El estado de poder proceder con algo con poco esfuerzo o dificultad.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: The state of being able to proceed with something with little effort or difficulty.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: The storm caused a lot of damage.]
